---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
date:

# ----------------------------
# Metadata
# ----------------------------

location:
country:
coordinates:
  latitude:
  longitude:

elevation:
ecosystem:

fieldwork:
institution:
role:

themes: []

related-essays: []

related-journeys: []

hero-image:

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.journey-page}

# Hero

::: {.journey-hero}

![](`r hero-image`){.journey-hero-image}

# {{< meta title >}}

::: {.journey-subtitle}
{{< meta subtitle >}}
:::

::: {.journey-meta}

**{{< meta date >}}**

{{< meta location >}}

{{< meta ecosystem >}}

:::

:::

---

# Field Story

::: {.journey-story}

Begin with a story.

Not a travel diary.

Not a report.

Describe the moment when this landscape began changing the way you think.

Write scenes.

Write people.

Write observations.

Let the larger ideas emerge naturally.

:::

---

# Field Journal

::: {.journey-journal}

| | |
|---|---|
| **Location** | |
| **Date** | |
| **Elevation** | |
| **Ecosystem** | |
| **Institution** | |
| **Role** | |

:::

---

# Photo Essay

::: {.journey-gallery}

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

*Landscape*

---

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

*Scientist at Work*

---

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

*Field Notes*

---

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

*Ecological Detail*

:::

---

# Reflection

This is not a summary.

Answer only one question:

**How did this place change the way I think?**

---

# Connections

## Related Essays

- Thinking Across Scales

- Seeing Across Scales

---

## Related Places

- Inner Mongolia

- Everglades

- California

---

## Themes

- Political Ecology

- Landscape Ecology

- Ecological Accounting

:::
